goal: Register the complete effective G4A-U01 large-number KnowledgePoint and canonical operation-model authority, then connect the existing Phase 1-3 generator, shared validator and renderer through the Golden shared runtime without changing question content or public output.

authorityLineage.producer: source-pattern-index plus G4A-U01 Phase 1-3 runtime authority
authorityLineage.authoritativeState: G4A-U01 KnowledgeOperation registry with eighteen KnowledgePoints, eighteen canonical operation models and eighteen PatternSpec bindings
authorityLineage.runtimeConsumer: existing G4A-U01 Phase 1 and Phase 3 runtime-fix generators, common Batch A validator and S60J renderer
authorityLineage.readback: exact-head production HTML/PDF/hash/DOM readback with all eighteen PatternSpecs and zero validator errors
